title: ForgeRock Managed Role
description: A managed role object in the ForgeRock Identity Platform. Roles define collections of privileges and can be assigned to users either directly or through conditional membership rules.

_id.description: Unique identifier assigned by the system

_rev.description: Object revision string for optimistic concurrency control

condition.description: Query filter expression for conditional (dynamic) role membership. Users matching this condition are automatically assigned the role.

temporalConstraints.description: Time-based constraints for role activation. The role is only active during the specified time windows.

assignments.description: References to assignment objects that define what this role grants on connected systems

_ref.description: Reference path to the assignment object

members.description: References to user objects that are members of this role
